judge_result.judge:
@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent filtered CHI papers by querying the paper_docs Mongo collection for documents whose full "text" contained the substring "CHI" (query_db call_gsL9uEg7zKvWSW97fnGhsUw7) and then matched those filenames to 2020 citation totals, instead of correctly extracting and filtering by the actual CHI venue, leading to an incomplete set and an undercount compared to the ground truth.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: yes
FM4: no
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent correctly planned to sum 2020 citations for CHI papers but implemented CHI detection incorrectly by first restricting Mongo documents to those whose text contains "CHI" and then using narrow regex heuristics in execute_python, causing many CHI papers to be missed and resulting in an undercount (1789 instead of 3835).
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent misidentified CHI papers by using an overly narrow and noisy regex on the paper text—first prefiltering Mongo documents by any occurrence of "CHI" and then requiring the pattern r"CHI\s+'?\d{2}" in execute_python—thereby missing many true CHI papers and possibly including non-CHI papers, which led to an undercount (2599 instead of 3835).
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: no
FM3: no
FM4: yes
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
The agent identified CHI papers by querying paper_docs with a regex for "CHI" anywhere in the full text (call_ARrxfa8uS6zaS6hLufyBQSKz) rather than extracting and filtering by the venue field, leading to inclusion of non-CHI papers when summing 2020 citations (calls var_call_gnOoDoW5FtsgRn6Gq9Z3s5mf and call_tlVMIyOOEqwfzxGG6EtTV8Jm), and thus an incorrect total of 3870.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no
FM2: yes
FM3: no
FM4: no
@@

@@
A. Freeform text summary of the failure:
After correctly querying 2020 citations and loading paper documents, the agent’s plan to identify CHI papers and sum citations failed at implementation due to repeated execute_python SyntaxError (“unterminated string literal”) while parsing text for CHI indicators, leading it to abort without computing the total.
B. Failure modes encountered:
FM1: no

FM4: yes
